creator: votdev@gmx.de
text:
You can also use volker@freenas.org

Patch for 0.7 can be found here:
http://freenas.svn.sourceforge.net/viewvc/freenas/trunk/build/ports/geom_eli/files/geom_eli.c.diff?view=markup

Regards
Volker
